title: centinodia agrestina
intro: Centinodia agrestina, also known as the wild cinnamon tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to the tropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Centinodia agrestina include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
